tldr: Axel Laurance took the uphill drag finish into Basauri for INEOS Grenadiers, two seconds clear of UAE's Igor Arrieta Lizarraga. Seixas defended yellow without difficulty in the front group.

narrative.headline: Laurance solo-to-edge into Basauri
narrative.body: Hilly/medium-mountain, uphill drag finish. Laurance gapped the favourites' group late, held two seconds clear of Arrieta.

gcImpact.headline: Seixas holds yellow
gcImpact.body: Day for the GC defenders; Seixas in the front group, no further damage.
